channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tate Brothers Face Extradition Charges in UK Rape and Trafficking Case
item.description: Andrew and Tristan Tate, the controversial influencer brothers known for their misogynistic rhetoric, were arrested in Miami by U.S. Marshals on a sealed warrant related to extradition requests from B...

item.title: Kenyans Turn Football Screening into Political Protest at KICC
item.description: Hundreds of Kenyans gathered at Nairobi's KICC for a public screening of the Spain vs Argentina World Cup match, creating a vibrant atmosphere. However, the event took an unexpected political turn as ...

item.title: Coco Martin and Dingdong Dantes Announce New AKTOR PH Project
item.description: Coco Martin and Dingdong Dantes have joined forces for a new project under the AKTOR PH initiative, marking a significant collaboration in Philippine entertainment. The partnership, announced on July ...

item.title: Vancouver World Cup Viewing Parties Reach Full Capacity as Tournament Concludes
item.description: The article reports that World Cup viewing parties in Vancouver were at full capacity for the final match, highlighting the city's enthusiastic support for the tournament. Published on July 19, 2026, ...

item.title: Alcohol use linked to sexual violence and HIV risk among young women in South Africa
item.description: A study published in South Africa highlights the complex relationship between hazardous drinking, sexual violence, and HIV risk among adolescent girls and young women. The research, conducted as part ...

item.title: Controversial World Cup Half-Time Show Sparks Debate Over Spectacle at 2026 Final

item.title: Transport Groups Demand P2 Fare Hike Amid Rising Fuel Costs
item.description: Transport groups in the Philippines are demanding a P2 fare increase and considering a nationwide strike due to the surge in fuel prices caused by geopolitical tensions between the United States and I...

item.title: Ganduje Warns Obi and Atiku Lack Grassroots Support to Challenge Tinubu in 2027 Election
item.description: Abdullahi Ganduje, former APC chairman, warned that Peter Obi (NDC) and Atiku Abubakar (ADC) lack the grassroots structure and regional appeal needed to unseat President Tinubu in the 2027 election. H...

item.title: NRC Proposes Relaxing Radiation Exposure Limits to Cut Costs and Pleasing Donors
item.description: The U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) has proposed a draft rule allowing nuclear power plants to increase radiation exposure limits at their discretion, prioritizing cost savings over safety. C...

item.title: ADHD Medication Risks and Long-Term Heart Effects
item.description: Dr Max Pemberton, a psychiatrist, warns about the long-term cardiovascular risks associated with ADHD medication. He recounts a case of a patient who suffered a cardiac arrest while on ADHD drugs, hig...

item.title: Bald eagle Jackie rescued near Big Bear after ground fight with sub-adults
item.description: A bald eagle believed to be Jackie, one-half of the iconic Big Bear nest livestream pair, was rescued near Big Bear Lake after being found on the ground in a fight with two sub-adult eagles. The adult...

item.title: Iran Targets U.S. Military in Kuwait Amid Escalating West Asia Conflict
item.description: The article reports on the ongoing conflict between Iran and the United States, highlighting recent military actions. Iranian Revolutionary Guards claimed to have attacked US military targets in Kuwai...

item.title: Nairobi Security Guards Ask Patrons for Money, Kenyans React
item.description: Australian strategist Mark Pollard shared concerns about security guards at Nairobi bars and clubs asking patrons for money, sparking debates on local traditions and cultural practices. In a TikTok vi...

item.title: CRDB Bank Supports Youth Football Development Through Imbeju Academy
item.description: The article highlights CRDB Bank's initiative to nurture young football talents through the Imbeju Football Academy, aiming to develop local players for national competitions. It also mentions Tuchel'...

item.title: Argentina's World Cup final defeat highlights Messi's legacy and team's decline
item.description: Lionel Messi's farewell World Cup final ended in disappointment as Argentina's performance faltered against Spain. The match, held at New York New Jersey Stadium, saw Argentina fail to score in regula...

item.title: One Nation's Exploitation of Public Sentiment: A Modern Spiritualist Scam
item.description: The article draws parallels between the tactics of 19th-century spiritualists and the modern political strategies of One Nation, led by Pauline Hanson. It argues that the party exploits widespread eco...

item.title: IEC Mandate Needs Update as Economic Inequality and Democratic Collapse Loom
item.description: Pali Lehohla's article critiques the South African Institute of Race Relations (IEC) for failing to address systemic economic inequality and democratic erosion. Using census data, he highlights how we...

item.title: BDO's initiative helps renters transition to homeownership through affordable mortgage programs
item.description: The article discusses BDO's promotional feature highlighting their initiative that enables renters to convert their monthly rent payments into a pathway toward lasting home ownership. This program, sp...

item.title: Rodri Crowned World Cup 2026 Player of the Tournament as Spain Sweep Individual Awards
item.description: Spain's captain, Rodri, has been named the best player of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after leading his team to victory. The 30-year-old midfielder from Manchester City broke records with 94% pass complet...

item.title: Enugu State Launches Task Force to Tackle Medical Quackery
item.description: The Enugu State Government has officially launched an Inter-Ministerial Task Team focused on combating medical quackery, illegal medical practices, and unlicensed health facilities. Commissioner Georg...
